interpretation.primary_cause: Atomic swaps with zero observed survival were skipped for rendered-integrity failures, allowing substantially more unused alternative donors to reach verification.
interpretation.boundary_extension_result: No selected placement had sufficient source and slot headroom in this run; the executable family remains available but did not cause the measured gain.
interpretation.next_calibration_target: Separate failure-category prioritization so speaker, visual, and performance defects do not inherit the same candidate route as rendered boundary failures.
